## Checklist

- [ ] Content JSON edits validated by `npm run check:content` / `check:nrta` (or N/A)
- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A — explain)
- [ ] Docs touched if behavior, API, or content schema changed (or N/A)
- [ ] Screenshots attached if UI changed (or N/A)
- [ ] Breaking changes called out explicitly (or N/A)
